text.title: growth-indiehackers-strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-indiehackers-strategy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Asking "What do you think of my idea?" without context, stage information, or what kind of feedback you need.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Non-specific asks produce non-specific answers ("looks good!") that are useless. They also signal that the maker hasn't thought deeply about the problem.

failure-mode.description: Only posting wins and growth numbers, hiding failures and pivots.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reads as a marketing account, not a real maker. Community disengages. The most-shared IH posts are about failure, pivots, and hard lessons — not clean success stories.

failure-mode.description: Posting an update and not replying to comments for 2+ days.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Comment threads that the author ignores die immediately. Replies create ongoing discussion that keeps the post visible in the feed and signals you value the community's input.
